_meta.purpose: Canonical detection patterns for the APEX defense-in-depth security layer. Single source of truth shared by the .sh and .cjs guard implementations so they cannot drift. Consumed by framework/hooks/security.cjs at runtime and by framework/tests/test-hooks-cjs.sh as a fixture set for parity testing.
_meta.spec_anchor: Defense-in-Depth Security Layer: apex-prompt-guard.js, Path Traversal Prevention, apex-workflow-guard.js, CI scanner, security.cjs module.
_meta.preservation_contract: Pattern set is byte-equivalent to the regex literals embedded in prompt-guard.sh, workflow-guard.sh, _security-common.sh as of the R5-003 port. Any pattern change here MUST be mirrored in those three .sh files.
